description.unified: Upon killing an enemy, reduces the Cooldown of all skills by 30% and gains [Harvest] stacks 1. [Harvest]: Increases ATK by 80*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), stacking up to 10 times.

light.unified: Mana recovery per second increases by 10% per stack.

description.unified: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to 5 times.
